text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The word "Leckermaul" is playing on Manhattan
Cafe's mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her concerns started with T.M Opera O's bizarre
assertion that Manhattan Cafe was "the
companion of Leckermaul."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Agnes Tachyon informs us that she'll
be preoccupied with her own activities while we're
at summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We begin the summer camp with a slew of mixed
emotions.
